entity.summary: Weighted-pool decentralized exchange protocol with current liquidity on Boba and Linea and recent on-chain trading activity.
entity.notes: The official domain remains reachable and currently carries ChimpX / Mojo AI branding. HEI retains the ChimpX AI DEX identity because protocol data continues to track current liquidity and recent DEX volume; no separate rebrand lineage is asserted without stronger evidence.
